AboutUsHook.headline: A Trusted Partner for
AboutUsHook.label: ABOUT US
AboutUsHook.description: As the demand for various plastic products to grow and industry competition become more intense, Ligo Group is committed to maintaining and improving product quality as part of our dedication to customers, Ligo Group also continues to innovate and deliver the best value for customers and all stakeholders, both now and in the future.

Homepage.distributionHeadline: Integrated plastic solutions with nationwide distribution coverage.
Homepage.distributionBody: With nationwide distribution capabilities, Ligo Group supplies trusted products and innovative solutions to customers throughout Indonesia to meet rising market demands.

AboutUs.heroHeadline: A growing group driving innovation in the plastic industry
AboutUs.heroParagraph1: Ligo Group began its journey with the establishment of PT. Ligokriyasa Mandiri (LKM) in 1986. In its early operations, Ligo Group focused on plastic bag printing and cutting services. Over time, the Group expanded its production capacity by adding various machines to manufacture PP plastic bags.
AboutUs.heroParagraph2: Over more than two decades, Ligo Group has grown into a rapidly expanding company and has become a benchmark of success within the plastic packaging industry. Driven by a commitment to sustainable growth, Ligo Group remains dedicated to delivering the best value to its customers and all stakeholders, both now and in the future.
AboutUs.visionText: To be the best company in its industry with excellent human capital.
AboutUs.mission1: The company where people work and grow, offering job opportunities to the talented and competent ones, and deliver more career opportunities and a better life in the future.
AboutUs.mission2: The company where people work and deliver the best quality products to give the satisfaction to all customers.
AboutUs.mission3: The company where stakeholders become an integrated part, together reaching the best benefit and financial profit.
AboutUs.businessModelHeadline: A cycle that drives our group from raw materials to recycling.
AboutUs.businessModelBody: Our business model operates as an integrated cycle, transforming raw materials through advanced manufacturing into products that support everyday needs. After use, these materials are systematically recovered and recycled, creating a continuous flow that enhances production efficiency and reinforces our long-term commitment to sustainability.
